narrative:
Precinct Fairfield Twp North (precinct in Columbiana County) has 718 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.5 percentage points.
